title: Citi UK CEO: 'Phenomenal' market resilience is keeping recession risk at bay — for now
summary_full: Markets have performed in an orderly way, despite the economic turmoil wrought by Middle East war, said Citi UK CEO Tiina Lee.
summary_public: Markets have performed in an orderly way, despite the economic turmoil wrought by Middle East war, said Citi UK CEO Tiina Lee.
